title: seseli trilobum
intro: Seseli trilobum, also known as three-lobed seseli, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to Central and Eastern Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits associated with Seseli trilobum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Seseli trilobum is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
